businessBackground: OneSpaWorld is the dominant provider of health and wellness services onboard cruise ships globally. The company operates spa, fitness, and beauty centres on **193 ships** across virtually all major cruise lines under long-term exclusive revenue-sharing contracts. It also operates destination resorts. OSW does not own ships, pay fuel costs, or bear itinerary risk — it is a pure-play on cruise passenger volume with asset-light economics.
catalysts: 2027+: Continued 4-7% annual cruise capacity growth (RCL guided)

flex.name: Derived-Demand Monopoly Position
flex.rationale: 90%+ share, exclusive contracts, <2 competitors, long-dated lock-in

flex.name: Mechanical Revenue Linkage
flex.rationale: Newbuilds auto-covered; slight variability from passenger-spend behavior

flex.name: Primary-vs-Derived Discovery Gap
flex.rationale: 5-9 analysts vs 15-25+ primary; ~3-4x gap; Phase 2 Partial Discovery

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: 15 ship deliveries in 2026 = mechanical revenue; EVIDENTIAL self-correction tier

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: Near-monopoly, 193 ships, exclusive contracts, revenue-sharing asset-light

universal.name: Balance Sheet & Torque (GATE)
universal.rationale: Net debt ~$67M; $50M revolver; <1x leverage; GATE PASSED
